Welcome to Project Kilo

Select a task from the sidebar. Fill in the data fields, tick each step, then mark complete.

Key Reminders
⚠️

Never move the device during a recording.

⚠️

Always measure and record lux before each task.

⚠️

Participant ID must remain consistent across all tasks and devices.

⚠️

Registration must be completed before any tasks.

⚠️

No hats or caps during initial registration — Task 1 is the only registration with a hat.

⚠️

All lux measurements must be taken on the participant's face, with the sensor facing the device.

⚠️

Participants are encouraged to submit more than required if time allows.

⚡ Power Automate — Auto-sync to Excel
Update the HTTP trigger URL. Every completed task posts a row directly to your Excel file on OneDrive or SharePoint.
No URL saved yet
📊 Dashboard Data URL
PA flow that reads all rows from TaskData and returns them as JSON for the Progress Tracker.
No dashboard URL saved yet
🔐 Login Flow URL
Separate PA flow that looks up a moderator by loginId and returns their record.
No login URL saved yet
🛠 Troubleshooting URL
PA flow that returns rows from the Troubleshooting Excel table.
No troubleshooting URL saved yet
Login flow setup (Power Automate)
  • Create a new Automated cloud flow → trigger: "When a HTTP request is received"
  • JSON schema:
    {"type":"object","properties":{"loginId":{"type":"string"}}}
  • Add action: Excel Online → Get a row (or "List rows present in a table") → ModInfo table → filter: loginId eq @{triggerBody()?['loginId']}
  • Add action: Response → Status 200 → Body:
    {"found": true, "modId": "@{first(outputs('List_rows')?['body/value'])?['modId']}", "modName": "@{first(outputs('List_rows')?['body/value'])?['modName']}", "odName": "@{first(outputs('List_rows')?['body/value'])?['OD Name']}", "location": "@{first(outputs('List_rows')?['body/value'])?['location']}", "email": "@{first(outputs('List_rows')?['body/value'])?['email']}", "phone": "@{first(outputs('List_rows')?['body/value'])?['phone']}"}
  • If no row found, add a parallel Response with body:
    {"found": false}
  • Save → copy HTTP POST URL → paste above
TaskData sync setup guide
  • Go to make.powerautomate.com → Create → Automated cloud flow → Skip the dialog.
  • Click Add a trigger → search "HTTP" → select "When a HTTP request is received" (Request connector).
  • Paste the JSON schema into the Request Body JSON Schema field:
    {"type":"object","properties":{"taskId":{"type":"integer"},"taskTitle":{"type":"string"},"category":{"type":"string"},"distance":{"type":"string"},"duration":{"type":"string"},"luxReading":{"type":"string"},"status":{"type":"string"},"stepsDone":{"type":"integer"},"stepsTotal":{"type":"integer"},"participantId":{"type":"string"},"moderator":{"type":"string"},"sessionDate":{"type":"string"},"deviceId":{"type":"string"},"completedAt":{"type":"string"},"notes":{"type":"string"},"submittedAt":{"type":"string"},"modId":{"type":"string"}}}
  • Add a step: Excel Online (Business) → "Add a row into a table" → point it at your Excel file and the table named TaskData. Map each column to its dynamic value.
  • Save the flow → copy the HTTP POST URL from the trigger card → paste it above.

Before You Begin
Confirm both sections are ready to start your session
✕
Setting & Environment
Location: Indoor lab
Background: Typical home background (2–3 rooms)
Lighting: Artificial or natural — must allow accurate control of lux level on the participant's face
Lux Range: 0–10 lux on face for all tasks
Backlighting: Required for one task (see Task 6)
Device Height: 1.5–6 ft
Props Required
Glasses
Hat / baseball cap
Secondary hair gear (e.g., headband, scarf — not a baseball cap)
3 chairs (for seated tasks)
Lux meter
Cellphone
Laptop (to upload cellphone selfie registrations)
Thank you for completing!
When you are ready, press Start a New Session to continue with the next participant.
Thank you for your feedback!
You will be signed out shortly. Have a great rest of your day.
Signing out…
Thank you for finishing the job today.
Before you go, please verify the condition of each item from your equipment set.
✕
Transfer Phone Registration Video
Please ensure to transfer the video recording from Phone registration to the laptop and rename it following this format:
PID_phonemodel .mp4
Replace phonemodel with the actual phone model (e.g. iPhone15)
How to upload the file Open S3 upload site
Important note
Review the recorded video and ensure the steps are correctly followed before uploading it to the client server. If the screen is blank or the recording frame is slow, re-do as needed.

Please contact the participant before the session time. If they're a no-show or cancel last minute, notify management and update the record in One Data.

Bug Report
Please use this to report technical issues related to the client-provided devices.
⚠ Be sure the power is connected to a stable power source and network (Wi-Fi speed) is stable condition.

Device A Issue

✕
Enable IR Camera
In the main DC screen, click SET CAMERA:
In the Camera Settings dialog, set IR LED Mode to On and IR LED Power to Auto, then click APPLY: In the Camera Settings dialog, set IR LED Mode to On and IR LED Power to Manual High, then click APPLY:
✕
Disable IR Camera
In the main DC screen, click SET CAMERA:
In the Camera Settings dialog, set IR LED Mode to Off and IR LED Power to Auto, then click APPLY:
✕
Enable High Resolution
Go to the menu (⋮ in the top right), then click 2104×1560 only to enable high resolution:
Confirm Your Equipment Set
Select the equipment set you are using for this session. Verify all items are present before confirming.

Allowed
Prescribed glasses (for participants who normally wear them)
Not Allowed

Participant First Name

✕
Clear Participant Data First
Before starting a new participant, you must clear the previous participant's data on the device to avoid mixing recordings.
1Participant data must be cleared 15 minutes prior to the next session.
2Open the device menu (three dots ⋮ in the recorder app).
3Tap Clear participants (see image below).
4Confirm, then return here to begin the new session.
Tap "Clear participants" from the device recorder menu.
✕
Collection Reminders
General Collection
General Collection
Pace the participant's actions slowly enough for the video frame to capture the movement correctly.
Give at least a 5-second buffer after the recording is completed before stopping.
Resolution advice — select the value mentioned for the task (2104×1560 and 4280×3120).
Make sure to select Yes in the Mobile section of the Registration and choose the correct phone model.
All tasks must be set to Warehouse in the Environment selection.
Task-Specific
